【已完结+穿书+甜宠+同居+双洁+救赎+日常】
【男主非常缺爱，会自我攻略，无条件对女主好，女主帮助他重拾信心】
白薇薇穿书了，穿成了假冒男主救命恩人的恶毒女配。
原主如愿攀上豪门，成了男主傅时彦的未婚妻，却因为自卑担心男主会脱离她的掌控，便对男主开始了长期且频繁的精神打压。
无论男主做得有多好，原主总能挑出毛病，然后臭骂男主一顿，导致男主非常自卑。
一年后，女主会出现，揭穿原主的阴谋，男主报复原主，原主在寒冷的冬夜被活活冻死。
白薇薇不想被冻死，于是就一边哄着男主，一边马不停蹄地找工作、赚钱，准备跑路。
男主不是自卑吗？那她就夸夸夸，天天夸，花式夸，让他重拾自信。
本以为自己只是个戏份很少的恶毒女配，想跑路应该还是不难的，可谁知一年后女主出现，白薇薇向男主傅时彦提出分手时，傅时彦却无论如何都不同意。
“骗了我就想走？不行，你得留下来骗我一辈子！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9fdcd484613682f621486c543e5c69d3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"吃不完一大碗","author_id":"","book_id":"7611123581430287384","book_name":"穿成男主的美貌心机未婚妻","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6310人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7611124310152839704","read_count":"6310","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"150093"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"74","tags":"豪门总裁,现代言情,豪门世家,总裁,穿书,甜宠,双洁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9fdcd484613682f621486c543e5c69d3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779506387&x-signature=3Ff8fmoPLw3RmkJieJXxa3tqan8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2984534082851402","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"41"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324111947BD38383C26A9957AEB8D"}"}
